description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Save three highly rated teen-parenting articles for ages 13–18 that were published within the last 12 months, are over 1500 words long, and have at least 4.5 stars after sorting by rating from high to low.

target_names: Supporting Your Teen Through Stress and Anxiety
Communicating with Your Teen: A Values-First Approach
Setting Healthy Boundaries with Teens in a Digital Age
